name: 1 Bedroom Villas for Couple
address: Jalan Bangkiang Sidem No.8x, 80571 Ubud,
description:
The Villa is located in Ubud, 3.4 km from Neka Art Museum and has air-conditioned accommodations with free WiFi, as well as access to an outdoor swimming pool.

Each unit comes with a sofa, a seating area, a flat-screen TV with cable channels, a well-fitted kitchenette with a dining area, a safety deposit box and a private bathroom with bathrobes. A terrace with pool views is offered in every unit.

Continental and à la carte breakfast options are available every morning at the villa.

Blanco Museum is 4.8 km from the Villa, while Saraswati Temple is 5.6 km from the property. The nearest airport is Ngurah Rai International Airport, 41.8 km from the accommodation.

name: Romantic Escape with Rice Field View
address: Jl. Bisma No 888x, 80571 Ubud
description: Featuring an outdoor swimming pool, a garden as well as a terrace, the Resort is located in the center of Ubud, a 17-minute walk from Ubud Market. Among the facilities of this property are a restaurant, a 24-hour front desk and room service, along with free WiFi throughout the property. Ubud Monkey Forest is 2.7 km from the resort and Neka Art Museum is 3.2 km away.

name: Brand New Villa Close Sanur Beach
address: Jalan Bypass Ngurah Rai, 80361
description:
Located within 1.9 km of Kedonganan Beach and 1.9 km of Kelan Beach in Kuta, the Villa provides accommodations with a flat-screen TV. The accommodations feature a hot tub.

Each unit comes with air-conditioned bedrooms and a kitchenette with a minibar.

Guests at the villa can enjoy a à la carte breakfast.

Tuban Beach is 2.6 km from the Villa, while Waterbom Bali is 2.6 km away. The nearest airport is Ngurah Rai International Airport, 1.9 km from the accommodation.

name: Family Villas at Central Legian
address: Jl. Patimura 2B, 80361 Legian
description:
Located in Legian, the Villa has accommodations with free WiFi, air conditioning, a restaurant and access to a garden with an outdoor pool. This villa provides free private parking and a shared lounge.

The villa is fitted with 3 bedrooms, 1 bathroom, bed linen, towels, a flat-screen TV with satellite channels, a dining area, a fully equipped kitchen, and a balcony with pool views. For added convenience, the property can provide towels and bed linen for an extra charge.

The Villa has a sun terrace. Both a bicycle rental service and a car rental service are available at the accommodation.

Popular points of interest near the Villa include Kuta Beach, Legian Beach and Sky Garden. The nearest airport is Ngurah Rai International, 5.8 km from the villa, and the property offers a paid airport shuttle service.

name: Stylish Villa for Family
address: Jl. Anggrek, Gg Anggrek V No.2, Tibubeneng, Berawa, Badung Regency,
description: Located in Canggu (Kuta Utara), the Villa is within a 10-minute walk of Berawa Beach and Batu Bolong Beach. This villa is 0.8 mi (1.2 km) from Finns Recreation Club and 3.7 mi (6 km) from Eat Street.

name: Alang Alang Villa for Family
address: Jl. Bali Deli No.1, 80361 Seminyak,
description:
The Villa is located just a 15-minute walk from Double-Six Beach and about a 5-minute drive from Seminyak Square Shopping Centre. The villas feature a modern, minimalist design with spacious dining and living areas. Guests can enjoy dining at the on-site restaurant, swimming, a full-service spa, and free shuttle service to Seminyak, Kuta, and Legian areas.

In the Balinese tradition, areas of the villas are left open, allowing for plenty of natural lighting and fresh air. Modern amenities include cable TV, coffee/tea maker and free Wi-Fi.

Guests can enjoy full relaxation at the Jerami Spa, offering a variety of massages, facial treatments, body and foot scrubs. These expert treatments feature local oils and herbs.

name: Unique Villa in the Middle of Rice Field
address: Jl. Kajeng, Ubud, Gianyar , 80571 Ubud
description:
Situated in Ubud, less than 1 km from Saraswati Temple, the Villas features accommodation with an outdoor swimming pool, free WiFi, a 24-hour front desk, and room service. This villa has a private pool, a garden and free private parking.

The air-conditioned villa consists of 1 separate bedroom, 1 bathroom with a hairdryer and free toiletries, and a seating area. A flat-screen TV with cable channels is available.

name: Homey Villas in Central Seminyak
address: Jl. Kayu Aya No. 88, 80361 Seminyak,
description:
This property is 6 minutes walk from the beach. The Villas and Spa Bali is located in the centre of Seminyak. It offers free WiFi and villas with private swimming pools and gardens.

The villas are located within a 5-minute walk of the famous Ku De Ta Restaurant and Seminyak Square. It takes a 15-minute drive from the Villas and Spa Bali to Legian and 30 minutes to Ngurah Rai International Airport.

Consisting of one or two bedrooms, the villas are all air-conditioned and equipped with a large seating area as well as a private pool. They have well-equipped kitchens fitted with a stove, minibar and tea/coffee making facilities. Free breakfast is provided daily in the villa.

They boast a semi-open living and dining area surrounded by a garden. The villas have flat-screen satellite TVs and DVD players. Guests can relax on the patio or on the sun loungers located by the swimming pool.

name: Luxury Villa for Families
address: Jl Batu Belig Gg Kamboja No 80 Seminyak
description:
This property is 2 minutes walk from the beach. Located in the hip area of Seminyak, the Villas offers an outdoor swimming pool complete with sun terrace where guests can top up on their tan, and there is also free WiFi access in the entire area of the property.

It is about a 5-minute walk from the villa to Batu Belig Beach and the Naughty Nuri’s Restaurant that is famous for its delicious pork ribs. The fashionable Potato Head Beach Club is reachable within a 6-minute drive. Getting to Ngurah Rai International Airport will take about 35 minutes by car.

Accommodations at Villas provide guests with a separated living room fitted with plush sofa and flat-screen satellite TV, a dining area and a fully equipped kitchen. Each bedroom also comes with air conditioning and an private bathroom featuring shower facility, hairdryer, and free toiletries. Some bathroom also features a bath facility.

Other facilities available in this villa include a gazebo where you can enjoy an afternoon of quiet reading set in a lush tropical garden. The staff can also help organize any of guests’ requests such as on-site massage, babysitting, food deliveries, car hire, and tour arrangements, all with extra charges. Free on-site private parking is offered to guests who drive.

description:

The Villa is a 10-minute drive from Petitenget Beach and Ku De Ta Restaurant. Ngurah Rai International Airport is 6.2 mi from the property.

Featuring cable TV and iPod docking stations, the spacious villas are furnished with wall paintings and modern décor. Each villa has a living room and bathrooms with bathtubs. Bathrobes and slippers are also provided.

The spa offers massages, manicures and pedicures, and yoga sessions. Travel services include tour bookings and car rentals. The property also houses Kendra Gallery, which showcases modern local art.

The villa will provide you with air conditioning, a terrace and a seating area. There is a full kitchen with a microwave and a refrigerator. Featuring a shower, private bathroom also comes with a hairdryer and free toiletries. You can enjoy pool view and garden view from the room.

At the villa you will find a garden and a terrace. Other facilities like grocery deliveries are offered. The property offers free parking.

If you feel like visiting the surroundings, check out Ku De Ta (0.7 mi) and Petitenget Temple (0.9 mi). Bali Denpasar International Airport is located 3.7 mi from the property.

name: Royal Three Bedroom Villa with Private Pool at Seminyak
address: Jl. Laksamana No. 22, Laksmana Villas Estate, 80361 Seminyak, Indonesia
description:
This property is 6 minutes walk from the beach. Set in trendy Seminyak, The Villa offers luxury villa with a private pool and tropical garden. Guests can enjoy relaxing massages in the patio or bask in the sun on the terrace. Free WiFi is accessible in all areas and free private parking is available on-site.

Featuring high ceilings and semi-open concept, the villa has a seating area, a dining room and a well-equipped kitchen. It’s fitted with air conditioning, ceiling fans, a safety deposit box and a washing machine. For entertainment, guests are provided with a flat-screen satellite TV, a DVD player and an iPod dock. Each bedroom has an en suite bathroom with a bath, a shower and free toiletries.

The Villa, breakfast is served daily and special diet menu can be requested. Barbecue facilities and grocery delivery are also available. Guests who want to explore the surrounding area can ask the staff to arrange bike hire, car rental or shuttle service with a surcharge.

The Seminyak Square Shopping Mall is 200 m from The Villa, while Ku De Ta is 300 m away. The nearest airport is Bali Denpasar International Airport, 7 km from the property

name: Two Bedroom Villa with Private Pool at Uluwatu
address: Jalan Melasti, Bukit Karang Complex No 16, 80361 Uluwatu, Indonesia
description:
Located a 13-minute walk from Melasti Beach, The villa provides accommodations with an outdoor swimming pool, a shared lounge and room service for your convenience. Both WiFi and private parking are available at the villa free of charge.

All units here are air-conditioned and feature a flat-screen TV, a living room with a sofa, a well-equipped kitchen with a dining area, and a private bathroom with shower, bathrobes and slippers. For added convenience, the property can provide towels and bed linen for an extra charge.

The villa offers a continental or à la carte breakfast.

The accommodation has a terrace.

A car rental service is available at The villa.

Karma Beach is a 16-minute walk from the villa, while Green Bowl Beach is 1.3 km away. The nearest airport is Ngurah Rai International, 14.5 km from The villa, and the property offers a paid airport shuttle service.

name: Luxury Villa 4 Bedroom with Private Pool at Canggu
address: Jalan Sri Kahyangan Berawa, 80361 Canggu, Indonesia
description:
This property is 4 minutes walk from the beach. Luxury is a villa with a garden, located in Canggu, 700 m from Berawa Beach. Guests benefit from terrace and a year-round outdoor pool.

The kitchen has a dishwasher, an oven and a microwave, as well as a coffee machine and a kettle. Towels and bed linen are offered at Luxury Villa. Other facilities at Luxury Villa include a hot tub.

Batu Bolong Beach is 1.6 km from Luxury Villa, while Echo Beach is 2.1 km from the property. The nearest airport is Ngurah Rai International Airport, 9 km from Luxury Villa

name: Royal Three Bedroom Villa with Private Pool at Kerobokan
address: Jl. Intan Permai, Gang Cendrawasih, 80361 Kerobokan, Indonesia
description:
Situated in Kerobokan, Cozy Villa features accommodation with free WiFi, air conditioning, a shared lounge and access to a garden with an outdoor pool. This property offers a private pool and free private parking.

The villa features 3 bedrooms, 4 bathrooms, bed linen, towels, a flat-screen TV with satellite channels, a dining area, a fully equipped kitchen, and a patio with pool views. For added convenience, the property can provide towels and bed linen for an extra charge.

A continental breakfast is available each morning at the villa.

Cozy Villa offers a sun terrace. A car rental service is available at the accommodation, while cycling can be enjoyed nearby.

Petitenget Beach is 2.2 km from Cozy Villa, while Batu Belig Beach is 2.3 km from the property. The nearest airport is Ngurah Rai International, 11 km from the villa, and the property offers a paid airport shuttle service

name: Three Bedroom Villa with Private Pool at Canggu
address: Jalan Taman Wisata, Club Residence No.14, 80361 Canggu, Indonesia
description:
Located in Canggu, The villa provides accommodations with free WiFi, air conditioning, a shared lounge and access to a garden with an outdoor pool. This property offers a private pool and free private parking.

The villa has 3 bedrooms, 4 bathrooms, bed linen, towels, a flat-screen TV with satellite channels, a dining area, a fully equipped kitchen, and a terrace with garden views. The bathroom features a shower, while bathrobes, slippers and a hairdryer are also available.

A continental breakfast is available daily at the villa.

A car rental service is available at the villa. Popular points of interest near the accommodation include Berawa Beach, Batu Belig Beach and Nelayan Beach. The nearest airport is Ngurah Rai International, 14.5 km from the villa, and the property offers a paid airport shuttle service.

name: Luxury Villa 6 Bedroom with Private Pool at Sanur
address: Jalan Mertasari No. 3, Bali, 80228 Sanur, Indonesia
description:
This property is 3 minutes walk from the beach. Award-winning the villa combines modern and Balinese architecture to provide a luxurious tropical getaway just 200 m from Sanur Beach. The villa features spacious balconies overlooking the 70-m² private pool.

The Villa features open-concept living and dining areas overlooking the pool, and a library corner with reading materials. Amenities include a flat-screen TV with BOSE entertainment system. Guests can choose movies from the DVD library.

All 6 bedrooms are air-conditioned and feature a wardrobe, desk and designer linens. Each room has an private bathroom with hot showers. Some bathrooms also have an open-air bathtub.

Laundry service is available at a charge, while free Wi-Fi is provided. Massages and spa treatments can be arranged for guests. An in-house chef prepares daily breakfast, as well as lunch and dinner upon request.

The Villa is a 15-minute drive from Denpasar. Kuta, Seminyak, and Ngurah Rai International Airport are all 20 minutes’ drive away.

This is our guests’ favorite part of Sanur, according to independent reviews.

name: Three Bedroom Villa with Private Pool at Sarinande Seminyak
address: Jalan Sarinande, 80361 Seminyak, Indonesia
description:
This property is 2 minutes walk from the beach. A spacious standalone villa with a small plunge pool and an open-concept living area, the villa is only 3 minutes’ walk from Seminyak Beach. It combines stylish wooden furnishings with modern amenities.

The villa features a 51-inch flat-screen TV area with a flat-screen TV and DVD library. The kitchen has a stovetop, microwave and full-sized fridge. The bedrooms are on the villa’s second floor, both with a 32-inch flat-screen TV and an en suite marble bathroom.

Spa treatments and massages are available upon request. Staff can also assist with car rentals, with the option to hire a dedicated driver. Wi-Fi and parking are free.

Daily maid services include preparing daily breakfast in the villa. Guests may cook their own meals, or have food delivered from nearby restaurants.

The villa is a 25-minute drive from Ngurah Rai International Airport. It is a 10-minute walk from Seminyak’s restaurants, shops and nightlife.

name: Luxury Villa 2 Bedroom with Private Pool at Legian
address: Jl. Padma Timur, No. 16 Legian - Kuta, Bali, 80361 Legian, Indonesia
description:
This property is 10 minutes walk from the beach.Luxury Villas enjoys a strategic location on the border of Legian and Seminyak areas. It boasts villas with private pools and private parking. Free WiFi is accessible throughout.

A 10-minute drive from Luxury Villas leads to Double Six Beach while Legian Beach is an 8-minute walk away. It takes 30 minutes to drive to Ngurah Rai International Airport from the property.

Each villa features an open plan living and dining area as well as a marble kitchen. Decorated with artworks, the living area includes modern timber wood and smart TV. Air-conditioned bedrooms are fitted with wooden flooring, personal safe and a TV. Certain bathrooms include a bath tub.

Staff at the front desk caters to guests’ needs 24 hours daily. They can assist with laundry requests and room service. Luxury Villas provides daily housekeeping and free grocery shopping assistance for guests’ convenience.

Breakfast is served daily in the villa’s dining area, with choices of American, Continental and Indonesian cuisines

name: Two Bedroom Luxury Private Villa at Kuta
address: Jl. Pudak sari - Kartika Plaza No. 18, 80361 Kuta, Indonesia
description:
This property is 2 minutes walk from the beach. Luxury Villa at Kuta offers well-appointed accommodation with a private plunge pool and a fully-equipped kitchen, a 5-minute walk from Discovery Shopping Mall. Guests enjoy free Wi-Fi in all areas and one-time poolside high tea.

A 15-minute walk from Luxury Villa at Kuta leads to Kuta Square and Kuta Beach. Ngurah Rai International Airport is a 3 km drive away from the property. Airport transfer is available upon request and the service hours are from 09:00 to 22:00.

The 2-storey suite tastefully blends modern interiors with Balinese décor and open living room. A flat-screen cable TV is available in both living area and bedroom. The elegant, en suite bathroom features a bathtub, hairdryer and a set of free toiletries.

Breakfast is served daily in the villa. Staff can arrange pampering in-villa massages and provide laundry service. Room service is offered at a charge, while free parking is available on site.

This is our guests’ favourite part of Kuta, according to independent reviews.

name: Two Bedroom Villa with Private Pool
address: JL. Kayu Aya , Gang Bugis - Laksamana, 80361 Seminyak, Indonesia
description:
This property is 9 minutes walk from the beach. The Villa is conveniently located in downtown Seminyak, steps from restaurants, bars and shops. All villas boast a private pool and free Wi-Fi access. Guests can enjoy pampering massages and treatments at the on-site spa.

A 5-minute drive from Ku De Ta Beach Club,The Villa is a 10-minute drive from Potato Head Beach Club and a 25-minute drive from Ngurah Rai International Airport.

Each modern villa is fitted with a simple kitchen, dining area and a seating area with a sofa. Overlooking the pool, the air-conditioned bedrooms come with a safe, flat-screen cable TV and an en suite bathroom with a bathtub, shower and toiletries.

Luggage storage facilities and safety deposit boxes are available at the 24-hour front desk. Staff can arrange vehicle rental, area shuttles and airport transfers at additional fees, while day trips can be organised at the tour desk.

The on-site restaurant serves a spread of Indonesian and Western delights. In-room dining is possible through room service.

This is our guests’ favourite part of Seminyak, according to independent reviews.

name: 4 Bedroom Vienna Villa
address: Jl. Batu Belig Gg Kamboja No 80 Seminyak Bali
description:
Situated in the hip area of Seminyak, Vienna Villas offers an outdoor swimming pool complete with sun terrace where guests can top up on their tan, and there is also free WiFi access in the entire area of the property. It is about a 5-minute walk from the villa to Batu Belig Beach, Vienna Villas provide guests with a separated living room fitted with plush sofa and flat-screen satellite TV, a dining area and a fully equipped kitchen. Each bedroom also comes with air conditioning and an en suite bathroom featuring shower facility, hairdryer, and free toiletries. Some bathroom also features a bath facility.

Other facilities available in this villa include a gazebo where you can enjoy an afternoon of quiet reading set in a lush tropical garden. The staff can also help organize any of guests’ requests such as on-site massage, babysitting, food deliveries, car hire, and tour arrangements, all with extra charges. Free on-site private parking is offered to guests who drive

Nyepi Religious Day Please be informed that Bali island celebrates Nyepi (Silent) Day each year on the dates below. Nyepi Day is a day of absolute silence throughout the island and it is observed from 6 AM until 6 AM the next morning. No outdoor activities are allowed and there will be no check-in and check-out from properties on 22 March 2023, 11 March 2024 and 29 March 2025.

address: Jalan Raya Petitenget, Gang Rahayu No. 3, Seminyak - Kuta ( depan Warung Eropa ) Bali - Indonesia
description: The villa as an exclusive six luxury villas in the heart of lifestyle district of Seminyak offers absolute privacy, relaxing and peaceful. Each spaciously appointed three-bedroom villa features with spacious living, convenient dining and private pool. Each spacious luxury villa is designed as a modern Balinese concept where each villa offers combination of modern design with natural Balinese artifacts and artwork. Being your second home in Bali, our villas will encourage you to elevate an unforgettable experience. Enjoy your great time with family, friends or a combination of both with us where every day is your leisure time. You can start your day with culinary adventure to pamper your appetite at in-villa or famous restaurants nearby. Or share your time to find out your favorite fashions at top most boutique and delights of nightlife around Seminyak.

name: Luxury Resort with Infinity Pool at Ubud
address: Jl. Raya Desa Kenderan No.88x
description:
Set in Tegalalang, 4.4 km from Tegallalang Rice Terrace, Aksari Resort Ubud offers accommodation with a restaurant, free private parking, an outdoor swimming pool and a fitness centre. Among the facilities at this property are a 24-hour front desk and room service, along with free WiFi throughout the property. Guests can make use of a bar.

The units at the resort come with air conditioning, a seating area, a flat-screen TV with satellite channels, a safety deposit box and a private bathroom with a hot tub, slippers and a hairdryer. At Aksari Resort Ubud every room has bed linen and towels.

Guests at the accommodation can enjoy a continental breakfast.

Aksari Resort Ubud offers 5-star accommodation with a hot tub and terrace. Guests at the resort will be able to enjoy activities in and around Tegalalang, like cycling.

Ceking Ricefield Terrace is 5 km from Aksari Resort Ubud. The nearest airport is Ngurah Rai International Airport, 49 km from the accommodation.

address: Jalan Sri Rejeki No 88X Seminyak
description:
Situated in the Nakula district of Seminyak, Astera Villa Seminyak features accommodation with a private pool, free WiFi, a 24-hour front desk and room service. This property offers access to a balcony and free private parking.

The villa has 1 bedroom, 1 bathroom, bed linen, towels, a flat-screen TV, a dining area, a fully equipped kitchenette, and a patio with pool views.

à la carte and American breakfast options are available each morning at the villa.

The wellness area at Astera Villa Seminyak is comprised of an indoor pool and a hot tub. The accommodation offers a terrace.

Popular points of interest near Astera Villa Seminyak include Legian Beach, Double Six Beach and Kuta Beach. The nearest airport is Ngurah Rai International, 7 km from the villa, and the property offers a paid airport shuttle service.

address: Jl. Pantai Berawa, Gang Kresna No. 8
description:

Boasting a DVD player, the villa has a kitchen with a microwave, a fridge and a stovetop, a living room with a seating area and a dining area, 1 bedroom, and 1 bathroom with a hot tub and a shower. A flat-screen TV with satellite channels is offered.

Guests at the villa can enjoy a à la carte breakfast.

Manca Villa offers 4-star accommodation with a hot tub and sun terrace.

Vue Beach Club is 2.3 km from the accommodation, while La Laguna Bali is 2.7 km from the property. The nearest airport is Ngurah Rai International, 16 km from Manca Villa, and the property offers a paid airport shuttle service.

The villa offers a seating area with a flat-screen TV and a private bathroom with slippers, free toiletries and shower.

A à la carte breakfast is available daily at Astera Canggu.

At the accommodation guests are welcome to take advantage of a hot tub.

A terrace can be found at Astera Canggu, along with a garden.

Pererenan Beach is 1.8 km from the villa, while Vue Beach Club is 2.7 km away. The nearest airport is Ngurah Rai International Airport, 12 km from Astera Canggu.

description:
Set just 300 m from Jimbaran Beach in Jimbaran, The Jimbaran Villa offers a getaway with a terrace, outdoor pool, free WiFi, and a 24-hour front desk. This villa has a private pool, a garden and free private parking.

The villa is fitted with 1 bedroom, 1 bathroom, bed linen, towels, a flat-screen TV with satellite channels, a dining area, a fully equipped kitchenette, and a balcony with pool views.

A à la carte breakfast is available every morning at the villa.

At The Jimbaran Villa guests are welcome to take advantage of a hot tub. Both a bicycle rental service and a car rental service are available at the accommodation.

Popular points of interest near The Jimbaran Villa include Pondok Pemuda Beach, Tegal Wangi Beach and Samasta Lifestyle Village. The nearest airport is Ngurah Rai International, 9 km from the villa, and the property offers a paid airport shuttle service.

A 5-minute drive from Seminyak Square and a 5-minute walk from La Favela, The Villas features a private outdoor swimming pool surrounded by tropical greenery. The Villas provide free Wi-Fi access throughout the property and guests enjoy private butler service from 07:00 until 23:00 daily.

Certain villa types, the living room comes with flat-screen cable TV and in other types, cable TV is available in the bedroom. Air-conditioned bedrooms feature a mosquito net and private bathrooms with shower and bathtub. For guests who come in big groups, there are also an interconnecting door between certain units.

The Villas is a 10-minute walk to Seminyak Beach and is a 25-minute drive to Ngurah Rai International Airport.

Overlooking the pool, each villa’s terrace comes with a sofa seating area. A well-equipped kitchen with dining area is provided in the villas with private pool. Guests can choose to cook in their villa or have the villa chef prepare meals upon request. Vegetarian guests can be accommodated.

name: Amazing Rustic-style 4 Bedroom Private Villa in Nusa Dua
address: Kutuh, Kuta Selatan, Badung, Provinsi Bali, Indonesia
description:
This amazing villa is a secluded 4-bedroom ocean view private villa located in Nusa Dua, Bali. Only a 10-minutes drive to the famous Pandawa and Melasti beach where you can bask in the sunlight for a perfect tan. It is more than just a villa! It is a place for joy that suitable for winding down after a hectic day, spend an afternoon reading a book by the swimming pool and order an in-house massage to pamper yourself.

The space It is a perfect holiday home with a private swimming pool overlooking the ocean. Experience a luxury floating breakfast on the swimming pool during morning with your favorite coffee or tea.

Enter the villa from a private driveway and be ready to be carried away. With its high roof and wooden interior warmed by afternoon sun, you will find the combination of modern and natural touch soothing your senses. The open concept of this villa combines lounge, dining and kitchen area in one palatial space, suitable for a gathering with friends and family.

Feel the delicate shadows crisscrossing the polished wooden floors while you make way to the bedroom. The two mirroring bedrooms on lower floor are equipped with stone bathtub and outdoor shower area. Head to the second floor where two large classical bedrooms are waiting for you.

Their beautiful interior design and furnishings are situated under exposed wooden ceilings which give the bedrooms a tropical feel.

Other things to note Facilities: Private swimming pool Fully equipped kitchen Tropical garden Sundeck Free Wi-Fi AC at each bedrooms Hot and cold water dispenser Flat TV at lounge and all bedrooms with international TV channels En-suited bathrooms with bathtub on lower floor bedrooms Massage beds available on upper floor Hammock

name: Tropical Vintage-style 4 Bedroom Private Villa in Canggu
address: Tibubeneng, Badung, Provinsi Bali, 80351, Indonesia
description:
Situated near by Berawa Beach in Canggu, this luxury vintage villa designed for traveler to experience the state of being completely at peace in mind, body and spirit, in a calm tranquility villa home where staff cannot help but pampering you with comforts. The villa is conveniently located in an ideal location to discover Seminyak, Canggu and 30-minute drive from Ngurah Rai International Airport. Enjoy a one of a kind experience made for art lovers.

The space When entering this property, you will be stunned by the huge and lush garden divided in several parts with 2 (two) swimming pool and 1 (one) Jacuzzi in villa. First entrance, you will find the Jacuzzi and the children swimming pool. Close to it, you will find a cozy terrace where you can enjoy a drink or even dinner with you friends. From this outdoor relax area, you will have a view on a huge swimming pool surrounded by sundecks and green garden. For more privacy, there is a unit building, separated from the main house. Here you can find a beautiful bedroom, with a huge dressing room and featuring a bathroom with its own bathtub. There is also a nice living room, with an overview on the swimming pool.

The main building has 3 A/C bedrooms, one on the first floor, the two others on the second floor. All of them are spacious, bright and offer all modern facilities such as TV with international channels. Both has king size beds, expect one of them which has twin beds. The two rooms above offer a stunning balcony, where you can enjoy a nice view on the rice field, from on side, and the pool on the other side. From this place, you can get a massage upon request. Each room features bathrooms with showers and wooden bathtub.

On the first floor, you will have a full equipped kitchen and a gorgeous teak wooden table where you can have lunch or dinner with your friends or family. Behind the kitchen, there is a room, reserved for the staff. Nearby there are colorful sofas, perfect to read a book or just chill with your friends.

Other things to note Facilities 2 Private swimming pool and 1 Jacuzzi Free wi-fi internet connection Wooden large bathtub with hot cold water showers Full bath amenities, bathrobe, hairdryer & straw woven slippers Fully equipped designer kitchen including stove, microwave, refrigerator, hot cold water dispenser Flat screen TV with International satellite channels In-room safe deposit box Mosquito racquet, coils and lotion are provided Air conditioned living and bedrooms, each with en-suite bathroom Back up generator

name: Fabulous 3 Bedroom Villa at Ubud
address: Jalan Pantai Pererenan, Gang Dalem Lingsir, Banjar Pengembungan, 80361 Canggu, Indonesia
description:
Our Villa – an elite haven is a detached villa boasting traditional Bali-style living. The property is located in Ubud in the Bali Region and is 2.5 km from Ubud Market. You can fire up the barbecue for a tasty meal and enjoy the garden in fair weather.

You can leisurely walk to the galleries, restaurants, and shops in Ubud from this property. Ubud Palace is 2.5 km from our Villa – an elite haven, while Ubud Monkey Forest is 3.7 km away.

★ THE SPACE Three Bedrooms Private Pool Villa is a spacious, stylish place to live in at the hip area of Ubud. This villa is perfect for those who are planning to go with a large group.

Our Villa team are all dedicated in providing you the best experience of staying in Bali. Explore the captivating island of the Gods with ease and a peace of mind. Our villas are equipped with these facilities for your convenience and comfort.

* PRIVATE SWIMMING POOL All of our villas provide you with the luxury of a private swimming pool, ready to access at any time. Whether it’s for a refreshing dip in the midst of the infamous Bali’s tropical heat or a luxurious breakfast by the pool first thing in the morning, the space is all yours.

* LUXURIOUS & FULLY EQUIPPED KITCHEN Staying in a self-sufficient space is essential for any type of traveler. Each our villa is equipped with everything modern convenience can afford. In each villa unit, there’s a spacious, fully-equipped kitchens available for your convenience. Whether it’s for a lazy day spent just inside the comfort of your villa or to satisfy a craving for a midnight snack, it’s time to maximize the convenience.

* AMICABLE HOSPITALITY The Balinese people are renowned for their friendly smile and hearty laugh. Our service aims to reflect the spirit of the Balinese who welcome guests and treat them as family members. Have a stress-free vacation with helpful and friendly staff who are ready to assist you.

* PREMIUM QUALITY AMENITIES Down to every detail, we select and present amenities only of the finest quality. Aside from the standard items, you’ll find bathing amenities of premium choices. Bathe with the all-natural, pure plant-based body bar “Kalila” . All of our bathing amenities are inspired by the authentic Balinese lifestyle that uses only the finest natural ingredients

address: Agrapana Desa Ketewel, 80582 Gianyar, Indonesia
description:

With king-size beds and large bathrooms, the villa ensures privacy and space leading to perfect balance. Also providing plenty of opportunities to feel the stillness that is accompanied by the gentle lapping of the waves and birds singing in the treetops from the expansive open-air rooftop.

address: Pantai Gumicik Ketewel, Jalan Rpantai gumicik, Ketewel, Kec. Sukawati, Kabupaten Gianyar, Bali 80582, Indonesia
description:
The Villa is located within Bali’s eastern Gianyar Regency, has an ideal location to cherish the glorious sunrise and the stunning mountains that is exclusively face to our Villa only . A beachfront villa offering of the black soft volcanic sand and rolling waves. Comprising exceptional comfort, impressive tropical and modern design with unique traditional concepts. The main gate has Javanese “Candi” style and directs you to a wooden bridge over a fish pond to meet our hidden treasure. The Villa has pool views, free WiFi and free private parking, located in Ketewel, a few steps from Gumicik Beach.

All units here are air-conditioned and feature a flat-screen TV, a living room, a well-equipped kitchen with a dining area, and a private bathroom with hot tub, bathrobes and slippers. A dishwasher and fridge are also available, as well as an electric tea pot.

A continental breakfast is available each morning at the villa.

Guests can enjoy the spa and wellness center, organise trips at the tour desk, or rent a car to explore the surroundings.

A terrace can be found at this villa, along with a garden.

address: Jalan Goa Gong, Ungasan, Kuta Selatan, Badung, Provinsi Bali, 80364, Indonesia
description:
Located in Jimbaran, Our Villa offers a private outdoor pool and daily hospitality services. Strategically located in the Jimbaran Hills, with beautiful views of the Garuda Wisnu Kencana statue and the sunset over Jimbaran Bay. A 5-minute drive to the iconic Garuda Wisnu Kencana Statue, this hotel houses a restaurant and bar.

Featuring wooden and modern furnishings, Our Villa has its own garden, sundeck and spacious balcony for private parties or family gatherings. The villa also has a kitchen and living area, plus amenities like a flat-screen TV, free Wi-Fi in all areas of the villa, and a safety deposit box. There is a fully equipped kitchenette with a microwave and fridge. Featuring a shower, all bedrooms have a beautiful white modern style private bathroom with stylish washbasin. There is also a public toilet in the living area. At Villa you will find a media room and family room on the second floor complete with a pool table. Breakfast is served each morning and room service is also available.

Sidewalk Jimbaran Mall is 2.9 km from the accommodation, while The Rock Bar is 8 km away. The nearest airport is Ngurah Rai International Airport, 9 km from our Villa.

Located midpoint between Seminyak and Canggu, this lavish double-storey designer villa showcases five bedrooms, an outdoor swimming pool, an encompassing lush garden with sprawling foliage, three lounge rooms, two kitchens, and six bathrooms. With iconic Berawa and Echo beach both ten minutes away, Uma Berawa is simply irresistible as your “must-experience” luxury villa in Bali.

Bedrooms Our Villa boasts 5 bedrooms spreading over two storeys. Each room delights with modern contemporary design tinged with Balinese sensibilities. Large glass windows ensure ample mix of natural light and nature views at every turn. All bedrooms on the top floor overlooks the magnificent garden pool and adjacent areas. The two ground floor bedrooms open out to the garden few steps from the pool. Each room comes with king-sized bed, en-suite, TV and AC.

Outdoor Areas All living spaces on the ground floor are interconnected by a long L-shaped corridor. The lush garden area of this villa exudes easy and relaxed tropical ambience with the pool as its centerpiece. One side of the pool wall is densely covered by tropical foliage of all kinds, mixing harmoniously textured leafy greenery and tall palm trees, conjuring an irresistible island vibe. Choose to laze the day away on the lounge chairs or gather around the sheltered lounge area poolside with your favourite book and beverage. The sprawling greenery continues around the outside wall of the entire villa, integrating nature into all indoor living spaces and culminating at a quaint herb garden.

Indoor Areas The opulent living room in our villa integrates with great comfort a lounge area with a fully-furnished modern kitchen, linked by a large dining table. Stylish pieces of furniture and meticulous furnishings are complemented by carefully selected art pieces strategically placed to elevate the ambience of the space. Floor-to-ceiling glass walls usher in natural light aplenty with one side opening out to the garden pool area and the verdant greenery on the other. There is also an additional kitchen adjacent to the one in the living room. The second lounge area on the top floor is the cosiest, promising to be the most exquisite space in the entire villa. With views of rice fields right next to it and open wall, this idyllic corner is perfect for an afternoon tea, or simply reading a book.

address: Jl. Aseman Bagus I, Br. Aseman Kangin, Canggu, Kuta Utara, Kabupaten Badung, Bali, 80361 Dalung, Indonesia
description:
This Villa is the perfect place for your wedding and to celebrate the most precious moments of your life. Our Villa can accommodate up to 130 reception guests. The blessing can be done with views of the lush tropical garden. Your approved Wedding or Event Organizer will assist you with all arrangements for Catering, Ceremony and Reception or Parties.

This Villa Bali has six bedrooms, all named after exotic flowers with air conditioning, satellite TV and Wifi. All bedrooms have a king bed and a TV. The bedrooms are joined by an additional bedroom that can accommodate two children in a queen bed. The two connecting rooms share a bathroom between them.

Morning sunshine, swimming pool and our tropical garden are waiting for you when you stay at Our Villa. This villa features a magnificent 14 x 5 meter swimming pool with comfortable daybeds situated on the sun-drenched terrace and under the roof of a pergola. The shaded pavilion is the perfect place for massage, yoga or a romantic dinner under the stars.

The semi-open living area at This Villa is cooled by tropical breezes (with a little help from a ceiling fan), with an antique wooden daybed offering the perfect setting for lazing around with a magazine or a good book. Wooden sculptures, Javanese dolls and an impressive 14-seat teak dining table add whimsical charm to the white interiors of the living and dining room. The villa’s sleek modern kitchen sits on the side of the same open space and thanks to the generous storage space; the kitchen can also cater for larger events. Outdoor facilities include a barbecue.

description: Featuring air-conditioned accommodations with a private pool, this villa is located in Kerobokan. This property has a terrace and free private parking. The villa features 5 separate bedrooms, 5 bathrooms, a fully equipped kitchen with a dining area and kitchenware, and a living room with a flat-screen TV. Towels and bed linen are featured in the villa. Guests can relax in the garden at the property. Petitenget Temple is 2.3 miles from the villa, while Ubung Bus Station is 5.3 miles away. The nearest airport is Ngurah Rai International, 7.5 miles from the villa, and the property offers a paid airport shuttle service.

name: Spacious 6 Bedroom Villa with Beautiful Benoa Harbor View
address: Kori Nuansa Kav.17, Harbour View, 80234 Jimbaran, Indonesia
description: Overlooking the beautiful Benoa Harbor, the exclusive villa Jimbaran provides free Wi-Fi, and an outdoor infinity pool. Spacious and elegant, the air-conditioned villas all feature a lounge area with a DVD player and flat-screen TV showing international and local channels. A mini-bar, tea/coffee making facilities and free bottled water are included. Private bathrooms have either a bathtub or a shower. The villa is a 10-minute drive from the famous Jimbaran Seafood Center and Dreamland Beach. It is a 20-minute drive from Uluwatu Temple. On-site parking is free. Guests can rent a car or motorbike to explore the area, or arrange day trips or spa appointments at the tour desk. The hotel also provides newspapers, luggage storage and laundry services.

description: Located in the center of Jimbaran, The villa features an outdoor swimming pool, a garden, free Wifi, and free private parking for guests who drive. A flat-screen TV is provided. Jimbaran Beach is a 16-minute walk from the villa, while Kedonganan Beach is 1.9 miles away. The nearest airport is Ngurah Rai International Airport, 3.1 miles from The Lookout Villa Jimbaran.

description: Located a 30-minute drive from Nirwana Bali Golf Course, the villa has luxurious villas designed in minimalist styles. Each bedroom in the villa offers stunning views of the ocean, mountain or rice fields. The villa is a 50-minute drive from trendy Seminyak. Ngurah Rai International Airport is a 90-minute ride away. Each bedroom in the villa has an iPod dock and private bathroom with an over-sized tub or rain shower. A wine cellar, wine fridge and coffee machine are provided. Guests can relax by their private pool or in the dining room overlooking the ocean. The resort provides massage services, barbecue facilities and a game room. A tour and concierge desk are available. Cars can be rented for guests wishing to explore the area.

name: Bedroom with Forest View in Ubud
address: Jl. Bisma No 888x, 80571 Ubud, Indonesia
description: Ideally located in Ubud, this villa offers air-conditioned rooms, an outdoor swimming pool, free WiFi and a fitness centre. Among the various facilities of this property are a garden, a terrace and a restaurant. The accommodation provides room service and a 24-hour front desk for guests. At the resort, the rooms are equipped with a desk, a flat-screen TV, a private bathroom, bed linen and towels. Every room has a safety deposit box, while certain rooms also offer a balcony. All guest rooms come with a seating area. Guests at the accommodation can enjoy a continental or an American breakfast. Popular points of interest near the villa include Ubud Palace, Saraswati Temple and Blanco Museum. The nearest airport is Ngurah Rai International Airport, 36 km from the resort.

name: 1 Bedroom Villa with Private Pool and Jacuzzi in Ubud

name: 1 Bedroom Contemporary Balinese Architecture Villa with Private Pool in Ubud
address: Banjar Pinjul, Desa Kendran, 80571 Ubud, Indonesia

name: 5 Bedroom Villa with Ocean & Rice Field View in Tabanan
address: Banjar Pondok, Desa Beraban, Kecamatan Selemadeg Timur, 82162 Tabanan, Indonesia
description:
Getting to Our Villa incorporates a delightful journey through traditional villages, via quiet country roads, wooded valleys, causeways across rivers and, finally, a simple track that winds through the swaying fields of rice. Upon arrival, your senses will be awakened by the purity, spirit and timelessness of an extraordinary landscape. You will be greeted by welcoming Balinese smiles, the fragrance of tropical flowers and the constant sound of the waves.

Entire villa 1000 m² Private kitchen Attached bathroom Private pool Balcony Ocean view Lake view Garden view Pool view Mountain view Landmark view City view River view Pool with a view Inner courtyard view Rooftop pool Air conditioning Patio Dishwashe Barbecue Terrace Coffee machine Minibar Free WiFi

Villa Size: 1000 m²

Bathrooms: 4 A double story villa with each bedroom overlooking the ocean, ricefields or mountains. Each bedroom has an iPod dock and private bathroom. This villa has a private pool.

In your private kitchen: Refrigerator Microwave Coffee machine Electric kettle Stovetop Kitchenware Toaster Dishwasher Dining table Oven High chair Washing machine Dryer In your private bathroom: Free toiletries Bathrobe Toilet Bathtub or shower Towels Hairdryer Towels/Sheets (extra fee) Toilet paper View: Ocean view Lake view Garden view Pool view Mountain view Landmark view City view River view Inner courtyard view Villa Facilities: Entire unit located on ground floor Entire unit wheelchair accessible Linens Alarm clock Tea/Coffee maker Minibar Air conditioning Refrigerator Microwave Coffee machine Electric kettle Stovetop Kitchenware Toaster Dishwasher Dining table Oven High chair Kitchen Washing machine Kitchenette Dryer Desk Dining area Streaming service (like Netflix) Blu-ray player Video games Video TV Telephone Satellite channels Radio Pay-per-view channels iPod dock DVD player Balcony Terrace Outdoor furniture Outdoor dining area Patio Private pool Barbecue Clothes rack Fold-up bed Drying rack for clothing Sofa bed Wake-up service/Alarm clock Wake-up service Executive lounge access Smoking: ​No smoking

The two-storey villa is characterised by white Yogya stone walls, cream terrazzo tiled floors, lime-washed timbers, and a colonnaded walkway on either side, on both ground and upper floor levels. A single-storey guest wing, linked to the main building, presents two guest rooms and a media room. The style is modern and minimalist, cleverly blending sophisticated elegance with the ambience of the setting. The architectural concept reveals comfort and simplicity, while the interiors unobtrusively introduce natural materials, fabrics, and colours. There isn’t anything ostentatious about this villa; the chic simplicity ensures that nothing detracts from the incredible view.

The awesome vista takes in Bali’s chain of volcanoes from the mighty Mt. Agung in the east, to Mt. Pohen, Mt. Sangkiang and Mt. Batukaru – the island’s second highest volcano – which rises from its foothills just 20 kilo meters away, and majestically stands guard over Villa. On the seaward side is a windswept beach of glistening black sand, and a coastal panorama that extends all the way down to Uluwatu on Bali’s southwestern tip. On a clear day you can see Java; to the east you can watch the sunrise behind Mt. Agung and, to the west, the sunsets are amazing.

MINIMUM STAY 2 NIGHT

We kindly inform you that our villa is secluded on a quiet country road. The distance from the airport is around 1hr 30min – 2hrs driving, depending on traffic. And to Tabanan city around 30min driving.

name: New Villa Walking Distance to the Beach 4 Bedroom
address: Jalan Batu Belig Gang Kamboja no 80, Seminyak utara, 80361 Seminyak, Indonesia
description:
Our Four bedroom villa is our largest bedroom offering. Features a modern, open-plan living concept with a Big private pool for you and your friends/family’s peaceful relaxation include with facilities Air Conditioned room, Bar , Equipped kitchen, Big Smart Tv, Living room , dinning room, Media Room and Amazing Bathtub in the room.

See, feel, touch and taste the authentic culture and natural beauty of Bali with our curated island experiences, offered exclusively for Vienna Villas guests.

From touring age-old villages to experiencing magical Balinese rituals or surfing the world-class waves of our island home, here are a selection of our private insider tours that will help you to get under the skin of the real Indonesia.

Exploring Bali is easy from the Villas. Several breathtakingly beautiful temples are, but, a short journey away. Our concierge will happily assist in making bookings for your private tours, all of which include car, driver, petrol and refreshments, on an hourly, half or full day basis.

Immerse yourself in the colour and sound of a traditional festival, dine on local specialities, snorkel beautiful reefs, watch craftspeople at work, wander through lush rice fields, or just relax and be pampered at a Balinese spa. There’s an awful lot to do in paradise and it’s not all about the beaches.

name: Stunning 5 Bedroom Private Pool Villa with Views of the Ocean, Mountain Or Rice Fields in Tabanan
address: Banjar Pondok, Desa Beraban, Kecamatan Selemadeg Timur 82162, Tabanan, Bali, Indonesia.
description:
MINIMUM STAY APPLIED : 2 NIGHTS STAY ( AVAILABLE BOOKING FOR 4/5/6 BEDROOMS VILLA )

Located a 30-minute drive from Nirwana Bali Golf Course, the Villa ahas luxurious villas designed in minimalist styles. Each bedroom in the villa offers stunning views of the ocean, mountain or rice fields. This villa is a 50-minute drive from trendy Seminyak. Ngurah Rai International Airport is a 90-minute ride away. Each bedroom in the villa has an iPod dock and private bathroom with an over-sized tub or rain shower. A wine cellar, wine fridge and coffee machine are provided. Guests can relax by their private pool or in the dining room overlooking the ocean. The resort provides massage services, barbecue facilities and a game room. A tour and concierge desk are available. Cars can be rented for guests wishing to explore the area.

Getting to this villa incorporates a delightful journey through traditional villages, via quiet country roads, wooded valleys, causeways across rivers and, finally, a simple track that winds through the swaying fields of rice.

Upon arrival, your senses will be awakened by the purity, spirit and timelessness of an extraordinary landscape. You will be greeted by welcoming Balinese smiles, the fragrance of tropical flowers and the constant sound of the waves.

The two-storey villa is characterised by white Yogya stone walls, cream terrazzo tiled floors, lime-washed timbers, and a colonnaded walkway on either side, on both ground and upper floor levels. A single-storey guest wing, linked to the main building, presents two guest rooms and a media room. The style is modern and minimalist, cleverly blending sophisticated elegance with the ambience of the setting. The architectural concept reveals comfort and simplicity, while the interiors unobtrusively introduce natural materials, fabrics, and colours. There isn’t anything ostentatious about this villa; the chic simplicity ensures that nothing detracts from the incredible view.

The awesome vista takes in Bali’s chain of volcanoes from the mighty Mt. Agung in the east, to Mt. Pohen, Mt. Sangkiang and Mt. Batukaru – the island’s second highest volcano – which rises from its foothills just 20 kilo meters away, and majestically stands guard. On the seaward side is a windswept beach of glistening black sand, and a coastal panorama that extends all the way down to Uluwatu on Bali’s southwestern tip. On a clear day you can see Java; to the east you can watch the sunrise behind Mt. Agung and, to the west, the sunsets are amazing.

It has three levels of outstanding accommodation, including a games room, gym, spa, and 12-metre pool. A private chef and villa manager are available to ensure a comfortable stay. name: 3 Bedroom Tropical Serene in Jimbaran
4 Bedroom a Sublime Family Pool Villa in Jimbaran
3 Bedroom an Opulent Tropical Pool Villa
Traditional Minimalist 5 Bedroom Private Villa in Canggu
address: Jalan Nelayan, Canggu
description:
Featuring modern Balinese architecture, this villa is tastefully decorated in a traditional minimalist style, equipped with state-of-the-art handmade furniture. This five-bedroom villa is well suited for groups of friends or families. Located in Canggu, the villa occupies an excellent location next to verdant green rice fields and 300-meter away from Nelayan Beach. It is also just a short 15-minute drive from Seminyak, where guests can hunt for famous restaurants, shops and night spots.

This villa comprises 5 bedrooms (2 bedrooms with king-sized bed, 2 bedrooms with queen-sized bed and 1 with 2 single beds) tastefully designed and decorated located in separate buildings with their own ensuite marble bathroom with outdoor rain shower and bath. The bedrooms look out to the tropical garden and pool, which is also a fine choice for alfresco dining or BBQ.

name: 4 Bedroom an Exquisite Tropical Pool Villa Ideal for Families Atop Jimbaran's Cliffs
Stylish Suite 3 Bedroom Villa in Nusa Dua
address: Jalan Desa Sawangan, Nusa Dua, Benoa, Kuta Selatan, Badung, Bali, Lesser Sunda Islands, 80363, Indonesia
description:
Tucked deep amongst five-star resorts, the villa suite at this villa is an exquisite pool villa living up to the location’s reputation, offering the finest tropical holiday experience of its own. With an irresistible outdoor pool as its centrepiece, this relaxed style suite sleeps 6 in plush comfort. The expansive layout of two separate structures on an L-shape consists of a large living and dining room on one side, with three lavish bedrooms make up the other side. The floor-to-ceiling glass walls ensure ample natural light, with access from all rooms on the ground floor opening out to the outdoor pool. The relaxed living spaces are all designed with modern sensibilities for maximum comfort, complemented by exquisite furnishings and refined art pieces. The popular Geger Beach, popular with surfers, is a mere five-minute walk away.

All three bedrooms are ornate showcasing double beds, en-suite, wardrobe and AC and open out to the pool area. The stylish bathrooms are spacious with semi-open roof structure to allow in plenty of natural light. Decked out in white marbles accessorised by natural stones in parts, you probably end up longer in the bathroom than you plan to. All bathrooms are equipped in bathtubs and showers are equipped with resort level amenities.

name: 4 Bedroom Idyllic Tropical Pool Villa Perfectly Suitable for Families
White Castle Style 5 Bedroom Private Villa in Canggu
address: Jalan Kayu Tulang No.188, Canggu
description:
A truly breathtaking 4+1 bedroom villa surrounded by stunning green rice fields of Bali – Canggu. This place is large enough for celebrations like weddings, plus it has a great location in a peaceful area yet just 20-minute drive to the lively centre of Seminyak and the beautiful Tanah Lot Temple.

The master bedroom, which opens directly onto the swimming pool, will make your dreams come true. It offers a luxurious jacuzzi bathtub, both indoor and outdoor rain showers, and plenty of space. This expansive, white-themed room includes a king-size bed, elegant artwork, and a comfortable seating area with a flat-screen TV and DVD player. Additionally, it features an air-conditioned dressing room equipped with a safety deposit box and minibar.

The garden is a visual delight, adorned with statues and walls intricately carved from white stone. The space boasts vibrant green grass, tropical plants, and a pristine 15-meter swimming pool, inviting you to take a refreshing dip. Additionally, there are six sunbeds with blue cushions and umbrellas by the poolside, offering a comfortable spot to relax in the shade.

The expansive living space in this villa features an open concept design that exudes modernity, chicness, and brightness. It boasts a high ceiling and a flawlessly executed white interior, adorned with tasteful art pieces, including a traditional instrument. The lounge area is furnished with white leather sofas, two armchairs adorned with red and white cushions, and matching poufs surrounding a generously sized coffee table. For a more relaxed setting, you can unwind on the veranda using the rattan chairs. The dining area is appointed with a spacious black marble table and eight white leather chairs, providing an ideal setting for a delightful dinner accompanied by your preferred music playing on the iPod docking station.

name: Warm Modern 3 Bedroom Private Villain Canggu
address: Canggu, Kuta Utara
description:
Located in the vibrant hub of Canggu, this villa welcomes you with its sleek design, spacious interiors, and an outdoor swimming pool surrounded by lush greenery. With its clean lines and monochromatic palette, the villa blends modern aesthetics with bold pops of color in the exterior. Finns Beach Club and Berawa Beach are just a short distance away, ensuring endless enjoyment during your Canggu getaway.

The master bedroom occupies an entire pavilion and features a queen bed, direct pool access, and a spacious semi-open en-suite with a standalone bathtub. The other two bedrooms, one double and one twin, are located on the top floor of the second pavilion, offering serene garden and greenery views. With earthy tones and clean lines, all bedrooms create a relaxing ambiance for a restful night’s sleep. Floor-to-ceiling glass doors and windows provide abundant natural light and refreshing airflow.

The centerpiece of the villa is the inviting outdoor pool, connecting the two spacious living quarters. Surrounding the villa, lush greenery and various foliage create a natural and tranquil atmosphere. Unwind on the poolside sun loungers, or enjoy a leisurely afternoon tea on the spacious patio and extended balcony on the top floor.

The cozy living area occupies the entire ground floor of the double-storey pavilion and offers direct access to the outdoor pool. With a minimalist design concept, the dining area seamlessly connects the living room to the fully equipped kitchen. Neutral tones and wooden furniture create a homely and calming atmosphere, perfect for relaxing on the comfortable sofa while staying connected. Floor-to-ceiling glass doors enhance the sense of openness and allow ample natural light throughout the day.

name: Luxury Greenery-style 3 Bedroom Private Villa in Canggu
address: Jalan Subak Sari, Canggu, Badung, Bali, Lesser Sunda Islands, 90361, Indonesia
description:
Located in the heart centre of funky Berawa, this double-storey five-bedroom luxury pool villa inspires two grandiose living spaces, an outdoor aboveground swimming pool, a flourishing garden area, a generous kitchen, five bathrooms, and two guests toilets and a gazebo. With open-living architecture, each living space adorns high roofing with floor-to-ceiling glass doors or windows, letting in ample natural light and fresh air at all times. The veritable cornucopia of plants in the garden elevates the outdoor area into a beautiful space. Walk to the famous Finns Beach Club in less than 10 minutes, or ride down to Berawa beach in less than 5 minutes. If the ultimate Bali villa living experience is what you’re looking for, then Villa Reillo is your perfect fit!

Showcasing five bedrooms spreading over two floors, each features its own en-suite, floor-to-ceiling wardrobe, AC, and ceiling fan. There’s the master bedroom on the top floor, luxuriates with a TV along with an oversized walk-in closet and a bath. The three bedrooms on the top floor are linked by an expansive zigzagging terrace overlooking the verdant garden pool below. The two bedrooms on the ground floor are interconnected, have their verandah, and have direct access to the pool garden area. From the five bedrooms, three employs queen beds with the remainder twin beds.

Everywhere you look, sweeping flora fills the frame. The centrepiece of the outdoor area is the elevated T-shaped swimming pool gorgeously snuggled by luscious vegetation of every kind. From traditional tropical plants to cascading vines draping over the balcony, from low sprouting lush grass to towering trees, this colourful ecosystem thrives and lends itself to a soul-enriching effect. On the far end of the pool, a multi-purpose pavilion stands right next to the sun deck. There is also an extended grassy area on the top floor terrace, along with two water features for outdoor entertaining purposes.

Two opulent living spaces occupy much of the ground floor side-by-side, separated by a quaint garden and a corridor. The larger space is the main living room, linking a cosy lounge area to an oversized dining table, with a modern kitchen on the room’s far end. Floor-to-ceiling glass doors and windows render this space bathed with natural light at all times. The second smaller living area is an open-plan construct with super high thatched roofing and geometric cut-outs in parts of the wall to let in ample fresh air. Both of these grand living spaces are sleek and further elevated with sophisticated furniture and modern furnishings. There is also a long benchtop and guest toilet in each area.

offers a tropical holiday experience for everyone in your family. The villa can comfortably accommodate 10 people.

name: One Bedroom Suite Deluxe in Uluwatu
address: Jl. Bangbang Bendot Gang Hideaway, 80363 Uluwatu, Indonesia
description: The top floor of the villas is reserved for Uluwatu panoramic hill top view to the partial Indian Ocean Suites. Each room is discreetly situated at the highest point of the building, promising ultimate privacy, tranquility and the most incredible views of Uluwatu Bukit peninsula.From a combined bedroom and living area, experience the best of tropical resort living in Uluwatu, reveal in the framing view of the partial-ocean or step right into your inviting private infinity pool.

name: Luxury and Comfort with Three Spacious Villa
address: Jalan Bukit Permai, Jimbaran, Kuta Selatan, Badung, Provinsi Bali, Nusa Tenggara, 80364, Indonesia
description:
Villa offers luxury and comfort with three spacious, air-conditioned en-suite bedrooms, a stunning garden pool area, and a blend of traditional and modern design in the living room. The fully equipped modern kitchen is perfect for preparing meals, and all bathrooms are equipped with luxury resort-style amenities.

Villa presents an enticing allure with its three generously sized, air-conditioned bedrooms, each with its own private bathroom. The garden pool area is truly stunning, and the living room seamlessly combines traditional and contemporary elements in its design. The modern kitchen, complete with all necessary amenities, is ideal for culinary endeavors, while the resort-style amenities in all bathrooms exude a sense of luxury.

name: Outstanding 4 Bedroom with Ocean View in Uluwatu
address: Indah Resort, Kav. Alpukat 1 No.1, Pecatu, Kec. Kuta Sel., Kabupaten Badung, Bali 80361A, 80361 Badung, Indonesia –
description: Upon arrival, guests are greeted by a charming entrance that sets the tone for the rest of the villa. Ascend the stairs to the main floor, where a world of luxury awaits. The main lobby area features a delightful fish pond, adding a touch of tranquility to the space. Ample cabinets provide convenient storage for all your belongings, ensuring a clutter-free living environment. One of the highlights of this villa is the expansive balcony located on the right side of the building.

name: Promo 9 Bedroom Modern Aesthetics Villa in Canggu
address: Jln. Subak Ambengan 68, 80361 Canggu, Indonesia
description:
The villa situated in proximity to Canggu’s dynamic and vibrant district, a stay at The villa guarantees seamless access to all your needs. Despite its closeness to the energetic ambiance of Canggu, The villa occupies a sanctuary-like space where you can still achieve a sense of escapism on the island of the Gods. Our villas beautifully blend traditional Balinese architecture with modern aesthetics, offering an enchanting experience that seamlessly merges the past with the present.

The villa consists of two villas. The first villa is a luxurious 6-bedroom residence, with two separate buildings. The first building contains four spacious bedrooms, while the second building houses an additional two bedrooms. Each bedroom has its own designated seating area, providing ample space and privacy for up to 12 guests. The second villa is a serene 3-bedroom retreat, featuring a well-manicured garden with a koi pond, a wooden entrance door, and a pathway made of grass, limestone, and small stones. The entire property consists of 9 bedrooms and it’s sold and listed in 7 bedrooms or 9 bedrooms (entire property). The overall design emphasizes craftsmanship and attention to detail, creating an inviting and tranquil atmosphere.

Quick Facts

Property Area 1900m²

Location Jalan Nelayan, Gang Subak Ambengan, Canggu, Kec. Kuta Utara, Kabupaten Badung, Bali 80361

Capacity 18 people (9 Bedrooms, 9 Bathrooms). Sold as a 7 Bedroom or a 9 Bedroom.

Living Areas Spacious living area and exclusive access to 1900m² of the villa’s facilities and common areas

Pool Infinite Pool: 13,34 m x 4,7 m Main Pool: 11,52 m x 5,65 m Entertainment Smart TV 50″ in the 9 bedrooms 65″ in the Living Room

Staff Rest easy with an attentive and hospitable team at your service. Butler, Concierge, housekeeping and service staff. Additional staff (nanny/babysitter, masseuse) available on request at extra charge. Breakfast English or Indonesian breakfast service is available from 7 – 11 AM Dining Cooks are available to prepare and serve meals at the villa at an extra charge (Service fee & groceries)

Communication Complimentary WiFi in all areas of the villa In Room Amenities Hairdryers, Shampoo, Conditioner, Shower Gel, Towel, Wardrobe

For Families Fully equipped kitchen, Butler Service Safety & Security First-aid kit, fire extinguishers, safe boxes and security personnel, smoke detector Airport Transport Possible to be arranged with your villa manager at small cost

Daily Transport One car and driver for up to 8 hours per day. (extra cost)

Additional Facilities Massage beds, barbecue, available upon request (extra cost), billiard table, board games, mini put-put golf

Need to Know

Special Internet rates are only valid when booking directly to us. The above rates and details are correct at the time of publication and are subject to change without notice. Check-in time: 2 pm / Check-out time: 12 noon Late check-out until 6 pm can be arranged at half the rental rate (subject to availability)

name: Comfortable 2 Bedroom Villa in Nusa Dua
address: Jalan Desa Sawangan, 80361 Nusa Dua, Indonesia
description:
Located in Nusa Dua, 1.8 km from Sawangan Beach, the villa provides accommodation with an outdoor swimming pool, free WiFi, a shared kitchen, and a shared lounge. With free private parking, the property is 2.6 km from Mulia Beach and 2.9 km from Taman Sari Beach.

The air-conditioned villa consists of 2 separate bedrooms, 1 bathroom with a hairdryer and free toiletries, and a seating area. A flat-screen TV is featured.

Bali Collection is 4.9 km from the villa, while Bali Nusa Dua Convention Center is 5.1 km away. The nearest airport is Ngurah Rai International, 15 km from the villa, and the property offers a paid airport shuttle service.

name: Vienna Villas - Prime Location Between Seminyak & Canggu

name: Baile Bali Villa
address: Kompleks Dharma Village, Jimbaran
description:
Experience the perfect blend of modern design and Balinese charm at this brand-new 2-bedroom minimalist villa, located in the secure Kompleks Dharma Village, Jimbaran. Ideal for families, couples or small groups, this private villa offers comfort, style and convenience for up to 4 guests.

Villa highlights: 2 bedrooms with Smart TVs; a master bedroom with a private ensuite bathroom and shower; a second bedroom with a dedicated private bathroom and shower located just outside the room's entrance; a minimalist and modern design in a secure complex; a private swimming pool; a cozy living room with a Smart TV and direct pool access; a fully equipped kitchen; and complimentary Netflix and YouTube access in the living room.

Only IDR 28,000,000 NETT per month. Inclusions: Wi-Fi, housekeeping twice per week, weekly pool maintenance, weekly linen and towel change, Banjar and garbage fees. Exclusions: electricity and water (based on usage), cooking gas, personal laundry and personal consumption.

Prime and strategic location in Jimbaran: easy access by car or motorbike from the main road, Ngurah Rai International Airport 7 km (about 20 minutes), minutes from Pepito Supermarket, McDonald's, KFC and Jimbaran Sidewalk Mall, close to Kedonganan and Kelan Beach, and a short drive to Nusa Dua, GWK and other popular destinations.

What you'll get: a panoramic viewing lounge; 360 degree living with rice field and sunrise sanctuary; each bedroom with a queen bed and dedicated workspace; a master suite with a rice field sanctuary view; a ground floor suite with Smart TV and direct steps to the pool; and a fully equipped open kitchen.

Monthly rate IDR 25,000,000 NETT plus a refundable security deposit of 10%. Includes weekly cleaning, pool and gardener service, linen change and waste disposal. Excludes electricity and water (based on usage), personal consumption (laundry, amenities, drinking water) and additional services.

Prime location in Singakerta, Ubud: Ubud Center (Ubud Palace and Market) approximately 4 km, Ubud Monkey Forest approximately 3.5 km, Goa Gajah (Elephant Cave) approximately 4 km, Campuhan Ridge Walk approximately 5 km, Tegalalang Rice Terrace approximately 12 km, Ngurah Rai International Airport (DPS) approximately 40 km.

name: Secluded Jungle Sanctuary for Couple

This cozy cottage is designed for those seeking a peaceful escape without sacrificing modern comfort. It is a serene haven where the only sounds are the symphony of nature: the melodic songs of tropical birds, the gentle rustle of leaves in the breeze, and the distant calls of Balinese wildlife.

What you'll get: 1 bedroom with a private ensuite bathroom, plus a kitchenette and an enclosed living area with a Smart TV.

Monthly rate IDR 10,000,000 plus a refundable security deposit of 10%. Includes cleaning twice per week, electricity, weekly pool maintenance, linen change and waste disposal. Excludes personal consumption (laundry, amenities, drinking water) and additional services.
